data.acceptance:
✓ Comparison table or document evaluating all 5 frameworks across the 5 dimensions
✓ Code generation samples (generated stubs for at least Rust and TypeScript from each framework)
✓ Streaming capability assessment (examples or proofs of subscription patterns)
✓ Explicit recommendation or ranked shortlist (1st/2nd/3rd choice with trade-off summary)
✓ Decision rationale addressing local-first constraints and ecosystem gaps
✓ Document stored in repo (e.g., ADR or EVALUATIONS.md) for future reference
